message:
fix: use latest branch for production site edit links

On production (kubestellar.io), content comes from the 'latest' version's
branch (e.g., docs/0.29.0), not main. Edit links should point there.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
